source_pr.title: plan: fix a panic bug when aggregation push across union.
source_pr.body:
When pushing aggregation past union, we should extract all columns from groupby.
@shenli @coocood @zimulala @winoros @lamxTyler PTAL

symptoms: result = tk.MustQuery("select sum(c1) k from (select * from t1 union all select * from t2)t group by c1 * 2 order by k") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
failure_signature: result = tk.MustQuery("select sum(c1) k from (select * from t1 union all select * from t2)t group by c1 * 2 order by k") (executor/aggregate_test.go)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR ('plan: fix a panic bug when aggregation push across union.') primarily changes code behavior and/or updates tests, but the diff does not contain a targeted stabilization change tied to a concrete flaky failure signature. We therefore keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
